# Repository Initialization

Thank you for creating this new repository, to be fully completed the following steps are required:

- [ ] Confirm that the contents of this repository will not likely exceed 5 GB, and individual files will be <100 MB

_If you anticipate larger file sizes or repository content, contact the Data Mobilization Team._

- [ ] Update README.md
- [ ] Define LICENCE
- [ ] Generate a [metadata entry form](https://hakaiinstitute.github.io/hakai-metadata-entry-form/#/en/hakai)
- [ ] Should this dataset be available via:
  - [ ] ERDDAP
  - [ ] OBIS
- [ ] Can this repository be public?
- [ ] Should this repository be archived in a global repository?
